name: Cranberry Orange Salad
recipeIngredient: Sugar substitute equal to 1 tablespoon sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the orange and remove seeds.
2. Combine the orange and cranberries in a food processor and chop finely. Add the sugar substitute and set aside.
3. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
4. Combine cold water and enough ice cubes to make 1 cup of ice water.
5. Add the cold water mixture to the gelatin and stir until smooth.
6. Set aside until the ice cubes melt.
7. Add the fruit mixture.
8. Pour into a 2-cup mold or an 8-inch square pan that has been sprayed with Pam.
9. Chill until firm.
NUTRIENT ANALYSIS: 35 Calories per serving
Recipe provided by EVMS (Eastern Virginia Medical School), Norfolk, VA.
Submitted by Dick Miale and sampled at Diabetes Holiday Food Fest, Chesapeake General Hospital, Chesapeake, VA.
